mapper.insert:
insert into advisor_product_component (product_version_id, fund_code, fund_name, weight) values
(#{item.productVersionId}, #{item.fundCode}, #{item.fundName}, #{item.weight})
mapper.select: select f.id as fundId, c.fund_code as fundCode, c.fund_name as fundName, f.fund_type as fundType, f.risk_level as riskLevel, f.company_name as companyName, c.weight as weight from advisor_product_component c left join fund_info f on f.fund_code = c.fund_code where c.product_version_id = #{productVersionId} order by c.id asc
